title: dactylis glomerata f. capitellata
intro: Dactylis glomerata f. capitellata, also known as orchard grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata f. capitellata include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal combinations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
